causalAutopsy.notes: The blindspot existed from the apprenticeship program's inception: UX observation was encoded as prose in the mentor prompt with no required artifact, so non-observation was undetectable (35 ledger findings, zero experience-framed). Not introduced by any single PR — a design gap in how the program encoded a primary responsibility. Compounded by agent pain-threshold asymmetry (frictions auto-compensated, never recorded) and coverage-follows-usage (text-only drives never exercised photo paths). Surfaced 2026-06-05 by the operator personally hitting resend-asks/dup-notices/photo-failure in ten minutes of manual driving.
